intent: Add a ~4:00 PM outdoor café/walk event on Day 2 between the Financial Advisor Meeting and dinner

value.venue: Boyd Park, 625 River Rd, New Brunswick, NJ 08901
value.notes: A relaxing post-meeting wind-down. Stroll along the Raritan River at Boyd Park — flat, scenic waterfront path. Grab a coffee or tea at Café 12 Ounce (112 Albany St, New Brunswick, ~5 min away) and sit outside if the weather's nice. Easy, unhurried, and a lovely way to decompress before dinner. Allow ~1.5 hours.

inversePatch.value: Walk over in the same plaza for Shark Tank-famous rotisserie dough cones with soft serve. Open till 11 PM.
Vietnamese pho and rice plates (~15 min) — light and perfect for evening.
Wick Plaza, 1199 Amboy Ave, Edison, NJ 08837

intent: Itinerary rework: add cafes (Hidden Grounds x2, Delicious Orchards, 1906 Restaurant at Longwood, Pier Village), add hotel nap windows (Days 2,3,4,6), replace Union City Amin's with East Brunswick/Milltown halal lunch, add Friday light post-salon lunch, add Delaware car-nap leg, shift Tabaq to 7:30 PM and Delhi Garden to 7:00 PM

changes: Added 3:30 PM Hotel Rest/Nap (REST)
Added 5:20 PM Tea & Coffee at Hidden Grounds (CAFE)
Added 1:45 PM Hotel Nap (REST)
Removed Amin's Union City detour
Added 1:00 PM Halal Lunch East Brunswick/Milltown (DINING)
Added 3:40 PM Hidden Grounds cafe (CAFE)
Added 5:15 PM Hotel Rest/Nap (REST)
Shifted Tabaq from 7:00 to 7:30 PM
Added 1:00 PM Light Post-Salon Lunch (DINING)
Added 4:20 PM Delicious Orchards cafe (CAFE)
Added 5:40 PM Hotel Nap (REST)
Shifted Delhi Garden from 6:30 to 7:00 PM
Added 12:30 PM Afternoon Tea at 1906 Restaurant inside Longwood (CAFE)
Shifted Scenic Drive to 1:15 PM, Christiana to 1:45 PM, Brandywine to 4:15 PM
Retitled 'Drive to Red Bank' at 4:55 PM as 'Ishrat's car-nap leg'
Added 4:15 PM Ocean-view Tea & Coffee at Pier Village (CAFE)

notes: Rework driven by Ishrat's afternoon-nap preference and user's south-over-north trip direction preference. itinerary.md was updated in lockstep. Patch recorded as a human-readable summary rather than full RFC-6902 operations because edits were made directly via file tools outside the FloatingChat editor flow.

intent: Standardize destination card format: remove website + reviews fields/rendering; ensure every destination has phone + rating; upgrade generic placeholders to specific venues

changes: Removed website link block
Removed reviews count from rating line
Stripped website field from 12 events
Stripped reviews field from 40 events
Day 1 4:00 PM: upgraded 'Drive to Home2 Suites' → 'Arrive & Check In at Home2 Suites' with full venue+phone+rating
Days 2/3/4/6: all Hotel Rest/Nap events enriched with Home2 Suites venue+phone+rating
Day 4 1:00 PM: 'Halal Lunch East Brunswick/Milltown' → 'Halal Lunch at Samosa House' (specific venue+phone+rating)
Day 5 1:00 PM: 'Light Post-Salon Lunch' → 'Light Post-Salon Lunch at Nirvana Indian' (specific venue+phone+rating)
Day 5 5:30 PM: Celebration venue upgraded to 'Ganesh Temple Society Banquet Hall' with phone
Day 8 4:15 PM: 'Pier Village cafe' → 'Ocean-view Coffee at Booskerdoo — Pier Village' (specific venue+phone+rating)

intent: Systemic fix: trip-edit AI must research real venue details (phone/rating) via web_search and never ship destination cards missing required fields. Adds needs_info clarifying-question intent.

changes: Rewrote prompt: added DESTINATION_TAGS catalog (DINING/CAFE/NATURE/SHOPPING/SPA/ENTERTAINMENT/REST/ENGAGEMENT_HIGHLIGHT/EVENT/CELEBRATION)
Added standard card schema: destinations MUST have venue + phone + rating
Added needs_info intent for clarifying questions (puts question in summary field)
Instructed model to call web_search proactively before adding/renaming destinations
Forbid: fabricating phone/rating/addresses, including website or reviews fields
Enabled tools: web_search_20250305 (max_uses: 3) — was intentionally disabled
Bumped max_tokens 2048 → 4096 to accommodate tool use + research
Added citation extraction from web_search_tool_result blocks (threaded to response)
Added needs_info intent handler — returns question to UI without applying patch
Added validateDestinationEvents(): enforces venue+phone+rating on destination-tagged events
Rejects events with deprecated website or reviews fields
ENGAGEMENT_HIGHLIGHT / CELEBRATION exempt from rating requirement (private events)
Runs as final check in validateTrip() — last line of defense if AI misbehaves
Financial Advisor Meeting venue upgraded: 'Chase Bank, 629 Route 18, East Brunswick, NJ 08816' + phone (732) 254-2181 (real branch, verified via web search)
Removed Day 4 9:30 AM 'Men's Shalwar Kameez Shopping' overview heading (redundant with 3 specific shops that follow)

notes: After server restart, the chat should research venues before proposing edits (e.g. 'add Chase to financial advisor' now triggers web_search for real branch data). If info is genuinely ambiguous (e.g. which of 3 nearby branches), the model returns intent=needs_info with a clarifying question rendered as a chat bubble. Server-side validator rejects any patch producing a destination event missing venue/phone/rating.

intent: Map-below-events redesign: numbered destination badges, per-day route header with Open-in-Google-Maps deep link, numbered Leaflet pins, card-filler chips (category + duration + live drive-to-next), alt-venue slot with Find-alternative CTA, /api/distance-matrix proxy, trip-edit prompt teaches duration_min + category + alt_venue, floating chat widened 480x740 with single-row chips. Enriched 41 destination events with duration_min + category.
author: cowork-redesign-pass
notes: All 41 destination events enriched. Validator green. Distance Matrix degrades gracefully when no GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY is set (Keychain service: google-maps-key).
